privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic benchmark task for implementing an Android onboarding carousel in the 'TravelBuddy' app. The task creates a project at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/TravelBuddy with synthetic Android resources including three drawable icons (ic_explore, ic_plan, ic_share) and corresponding string resources ('Explore the World', 'Plan Your Trip', 'Share Memories'). The implementation requires using real Android framework components: androidx.viewpager2.widget.ViewPager2 (an AndroidX Jetpack component for swipeable views), com.google.android.material.tabs.TabLayout (a Material Design component for tab indicators), and TabLayoutMediator (a Material Design mediator class that synchronizes ViewPager2 with TabLayout). The task expects the creation of two main files: item_onboarding.xml (item layout) and OnboardingAdapter.kt (RecyclerView adapter). All metadata claims about paths, strings, and required components have been verified against official Android documentation and task setup scripts.
